posts.title: 10 Effective Study Techniques Backed by Science
posts.excerpt: Discover research-backed study methods that can dramatically improve your retention and academic performance.
posts.body:
# 10 Effective Study Techniques Backed by Science

Studying smarter, not harder, is the key to academic success. Here are ten techniques that research has proven to be effective...

## 1. Spaced Repetition
Instead of cramming, space out your study sessions over time. Research shows this improves long-term retention by up to 200%.

## 2. Active Recall
Test yourself on the material instead of passively re-reading notes. This strengthens neural pathways and deepens understanding.

## 3. The Feynman Technique
Explain concepts in simple terms as if teaching someone else. This reveals gaps in your understanding.
posts.seoTitle: 10 Study Techniques That Actually Work | CourseAdvice
posts.seoDescription: Learn the top 10 science-backed study techniques to boost your grades and retention.
